description: Create a computerized version of the Iowa Gambling Task (IGT) based on Bechara et al. (1994). The task requires a conditions file at ~/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/igt_decks.csv with columns for deck, reward, penalty_amount, and penalty_prob using these values: A (100, 250, 0.5), B (100, 1250, 0.1), C (50, 50, 0.5), and D (50, 250, 0.1). The experiment file, saved to ~/PsychoPyExperiments/iowa_gambling_task.psyexp, must implement a 100-trial sequence starting with a $2000 balance where Decks A/B are disadvantageous and C/D are advantageous. It should feature an instruction routine, a trial routine with four clickable decks (A, B, C, D) that updates the balance based on the CSV parameters, a feedback routine lasting 1.5-2.0 seconds displaying the reward and penalty, and a final screen showing the total money.
